title: Balanced recipes and copper
description: Craft debug stick, netherite template, trial keys, enchanted apple, copper's saddle/nametag in a balanced way. Also recycle netherite scrap and leather
body:
**BALANCED RECIPES**

This mod/datapack adds useful crafting recipes to Minecraft, focusing on obtaining items from scratch that normally cannot be obtained or depend on loot, but at a fair cost, using a reasonable amount of materials.

Note: normal version haven't trial keys crafting. Check trialkey version for this

Some examples
- Copper's fishing rod, crafter, saddle and nametag.
- Craft enchanted apple, bell, spore blossom trial keys (optional), debug stick, invisible item frame (amethyst) and upgrade template.
- Unpack amethyst, quartz, glowstone and cowbweb (also craftable with 9 string).
- Shapeless recipe to bread, cookies, paper, shulker box and 2x2 smithing table and others...
- Recycle: leather (armor, saddle), netherite/gold (neth gear), gold (apples, bell)
- Rotten flesh to leather.
- Stick and chest from logs.

This project has the following objectives:
- Create hard-to-obtain items at a fair price.
- Remove dependence on the crafting table.
- Make use of useless items (tuff, copper, amethyst).
- Keep rare items such as horse armor and elytra in that state.

- Future plans: More amethyst uses
